name: Make-Ahead Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and coarsely chop the cucumber.
2. Seed and dice the green pepper.
3. Peel, core, and coarsely chop the tomatoes.
4. Thinly slice the green onions (including tops).
5. In a 3-quart pan over medium heat, combine the vegetable stock, tomato juice, lemon juice, taco sauce, sugar, garlic salt, and pepper.
6. Leave the pan uncovered and bring to a boil.
7. Stir in the cucumber, green pepper, tomatoes, and onion. Bring the mixture back to a boil again.
8. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
9. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
10. Serve 1 cup per serving.
Per serving: 3 grams protein, 14 grams carbohydrates, no cholesterol, 64 calories.
An easy make-ahead soup to begin a meal with.
